empty.noPalettesHint: Create your first palette to get started
empty.openExistingHint: Pick a palette from the toolbar
empty.noColorsHint: Press ⌘⇧C to start picking from anywhere on screen

colorEditor.name: Name
colorEditor.namePlaceholder: e.g. Primary / Warning red / VibeCoder accent
colorEditor.notePlaceholder: e.g. Used for CTA button / dark mode alt

dialog.deletePaletteBody: Delete "{{name}}" and all its {{count}} color(s)? This cannot be undone.

export.title: Export as natural language
export.subtitle: Agent-friendly plain text — paste into any AI prompt

imageImport.title: Import colors from image
imageImport.subtitle: Pick an image; we extract the dominant colors

permission.deniedBodyMac: macOS requires OpenColor to have Screen Recording permission to pick colors from anywhere on screen.
permission.deniedBodyWin: Color picking on Windows failed to initialize. Try restarting the app or updating your graphics driver.
permission.deniedBodyLinux: Color picking on Linux failed to initialize. Make sure the current session is X11 and check screenshot/input permissions.
permission.unsupportedTitle: Screen picking not supported on this platform
permission.unsupportedBody: You can still enter HEX manually or paste a color from a screenshot.
permission.unsupportedBodyWin: Screen picking could not initialize in this Windows environment. Try restarting the app or updating system graphics components.
permission.unsupportedBodyLinux: Screen picking could not initialize in this Linux environment. OpenColor currently targets X11 sessions.
permission.unsupportedBodyWayland: A Linux Wayland session was detected. The current picker depends on global pointer hooks, which Wayland restricts by default. Switch to an X11 session to use screen picking.

status.pickUnavailable: Screen picking is unavailable for the current platform or permission state
status.noPaletteForPick: Create or open a palette first
status.pickDemoHint: Demo mode: picking will insert a random color from the demo set
status.demo: Demo mode: data is not persisted, UI preview only
